title: Create Weaponworks [Fabric]
description: Command, create, and conquer! Build tanks, forge weapons, and lead your army to victory in Minecraft’s ultimate war simulation—Create Weaponworks!
body:
# **Create Weaponworks**

**Command, create, and conquer** with **Create Weaponworks**! This [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)-powered modpack invites you to unleash your engineering prowess in a world where warfare meets intricate contraptions. Build tanks, deploy powerful cannons, craft advanced technologies, and lead your forces to victory in Minecraft’s most innovative war simulation.

![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/l25gHPVs?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=%231bc90d) ![Modrinth Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/l25gHPVs?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=red)
 ![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1332989818975551550?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&label=DISCORD&color=blue)
 
### 📥 Installation
- **Modrinth App:** You can download and play the modpack directly in the official Modrinth App.
- **Third Party Launcher:** To install and play the modpack with the .mrpack file, follow the instructions [here](https://docs.modrinth.com/docs/modpacks/playing_modpacks/).
- **Server Side:** To install the server-side mods, you can use [mrpack-install](https://github.com/nothub/mrpack-install) or [ServerPackCreator](https://github.com/Griefed/ServerPackCreator).


## Need a Minecraft server? Consider [TeroHost](https://billing.terohost.com/aff.php?aff=51)
